---
title: "Lecture 1: Introduction to Web Designing"
subtitle: "{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}"
author: "{{< meta instructor.name >}}"
date: "January 26, 2026"
code-annotations: below
---


## {#title-slide data-menu-title="Title Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="custom-title">
[Lecture 1]{.baby-blue-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Introduction to Web Designing]{.white-text}
</div>

<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Week 1 | Unit I: Web Page Designing<br>
{{< meta course.number >}} - {{< meta course.title >}}<br>
{{< meta instructor.name >}}, {{< meta instructor.title >}}
</div>

---

## {data-menu-title="Learning Objectives"}

[Learning Objectives]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
- Understand web development and web designing concepts
- Learn about web development strategies
- Explore different roles in web development
:::

::: {.notes}
Start by explaining the importance of understanding the difference between design and development.
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Web Designing vs Web Development"}

[What is Web Designing vs Web Development?]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

[**Web Designing**]{.teal-text}

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
- Visual appearance & UX
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Layout, colors, typography
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Tools: Figma, Adobe XD
:::
:::

. . .

[**Web Development**]{.teal-text}

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
- Implementation & functionality
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Coding the design
:::
::: {.fragment}
- Tools: HTML, CSS, JS
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Client-side vs Server-side"}

[Client-side vs Server-side Development]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Client-side**]{.teal-text}

::: {.fragment .body-text-m}
- Runs in the browser
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- User interface
- [✓ Immediate feedback]{.magenta-text}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
[**Server-side**]{.teal-text}

::: {.fragment .body-text-m}
- Runs on the server
- PHP, Python, Java, Node.js
- Database operations
- [✓ Business logic]{.magenta-text}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.notes}
Emphasize that modern web applications need both client-side and server-side development. Give examples like Gmail (client-side for UI, server-side for email storage).
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Development Roles"}

[Development Roles]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.fragment}
[**Frontend**]{.slide-title3 .teal-text}

::: {.body-text-m}
- UI & UX
- HTML, CSS, JS
- React, Vue
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.fragment}
[**Backend**]{.slide-title3 .teal-text}

::: {.body-text-m}
- Server & APIs
- Java, Python, Node
- SQL, MongoDB
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.fragment}
[**Full-stack**]{.slide-title3 .teal-text}

::: {.body-text-m}
- Front & back
- End-to-end
- Most in-demand
:::
:::
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Key Concepts" auto-animate=true}

[Key Web Technologies]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.body-text-xl .center-text}
HTML
:::
::: {.body-text-m .center-text}
Structure
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.body-text-xl .center-text}
CSS
:::
::: {.body-text-m .center-text}
Style
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.body-text-xl .center-text}
JavaScript
:::
::: {.body-text-m .center-text}
Behavior
:::
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="HTML Example"}

[HTML: The Structure]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```{.html code-line-numbers="|1|2|3,4,5|6,7,8|7"}
<!DOCTYPE html>                           <!-- <1> -->
<html lang="en">                          <!-- <2> -->
<head>                                    <!-- <3> -->
  <title>My First Page</title>          <!-- <4> -->
</head>
<body>                                    <!-- <5> -->
  <h1>Hello World!</h1>                 <!-- <6> -->
</body>
</html>
```
1. Declares this is an HTML5 document
2. Root element with language attribute
3. Contains metadata (not visible on page)
4. Page title shown in browser tab
5. Contains all visible page content
6. Main heading, displayed as large text

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
👆 Foundation of every web page
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Example" auto-animate=true}

[CSS: Adding Style]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```html
<h1>Hello World!</h1>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="CSS Styling" auto-animate=true}

[CSS: Adding Style]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```html
<head>
  <style>
    h1 {
      color: blue;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<h1>Hello World!</h1>
```

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
✨ CSS transforms plain HTML into beautiful web pages
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="JavaScript Example" auto-animate=true}

[JavaScript: Adding Interactivity]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```html
<button>Click Me</button>
```

---

## {data-menu-title="JavaScript Interaction" auto-animate=true}

[JavaScript: Adding Interactivity]{.slide-title}

<hr>

```html
<button id="btn">Click Me</button>

<script>
  document.getElementById('btn')
    .addEventListener('click', function() {
      alert('Button clicked!');
    });
</script>
```

::: {.fragment .body-text-m .center-text .topbr}
🎯 JavaScript brings interactivity and dynamic behavior
:::

---

[Web Development Workflow]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.incremental .body-text-m}
1. Planning & Requirements
2. Design & Prototyping
3. [Development]{.teal-text}
4. Testing & Debugging
5. Deployment
6. Maintenance
:::

::: {.fragment .body-text-s .center-text .topbr}
⚡ We'll focus on **Development** in this course
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Tools & Technologies"}

[Essential Tools]{.slide-title2}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment .fade-up}
**Code Editor**: VS Code
:::
::: {.fragment .fade-up}
**Version Control**: Git & GitHub
:::
::: {.fragment .fade-up}
**Browser DevTools**: Chrome, Firefox
:::
::: {.fragment .fade-up}
**Frameworks**: Bootstrap, React, Vue
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Why Learn Web Development?"}

[Why Learn Web Development?]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
📈 High demand
:::
::: {.fragment}
💰 Great salaries
:::
::: {.fragment}
🌍 Work remotely
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.body-text-m}
::: {.fragment}
🎨 Creative outlet
:::
::: {.fragment}
🚀 Build your ideas
:::
::: {.fragment}
📚 Constant learning
:::
:::
:::
:::

---

## {data-menu-title="Resources"}

[Resources]{.slide-title}

<hr>

::: {.body-text-m}
- [MDN: Getting started](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/Getting_started_with_the_web)
- [W3C Standards](https://www.w3.org/standards/webdesign/)
- [Week 1 Content](/content/week-01.qmd)
:::

---

## {#end-slide data-menu-title="End Slide" background="#053660"}

<div class="page-center">
<div class="custom-subtitle">
[Questions?]{.white-text}
</div>
<div class="custom-subtitle3">
Next: Lecture 2 - History of Web & Internet
</div>
</div>
